import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = 'data'
for file in sorted\(os.listdir\(data_dir\)\):
    if file.endswith\('.xlsx'\):
        df = pd.read_excel\(os.path.join\(data_dir, file\)\)
        print\(f'\\n{file}:'\)
        print\(f'  行数：{len\(df\)}, 列数：{len\(df.columns\)}'\)
        print\(f'  列名：{df.columns.tolist\(\)}'\)
        break
")

import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = 'data'
for file in sorted\(os.listdir\(data_dir\)\):
    if file.endswith\('.xlsx'\):
        df = pd.read_excel\(os.path.join\(data_dir, file\)\)
        print\(f'\\n=== {file} ==='\)
        print\(f'行数：{len\(df\)}, 列数：{len\(df.columns\)}'\)
        print\('完整列名:'\)

            print\(f'  {i+1}. {col}'\)
        break
")

from score_analyzer import ScoreAnalyzer
import pandas as pd

analyzer = ScoreAnalyzer\('data'\)
analyzer.load_all_data\(\)

print\('=== 加载的学期列表 ==='\)
for sem in analyzer.semester_data.keys\(\):
    df = analyzer.semester_data[sem]
    print\(f'{sem}: {len\(df\)} 行数据'\)

print\('\\n=== 合并后的 students_df ==='\)
print\(f'总行数：{len\(analyzer.students_df\)}'\)
print\(f'列数：{len\(analyzer.students_df.columns\)}'\)

print\('\\n=== 前 20 列列名 ==='\)
cols = analyzer.students_df.columns.tolist\(\)
for i, col in enumerate\(cols[:20]\):
    print\(f'{i+1}. {col}'\)

print\('\\n=== 学生姓名列表 ==='\)
for sid, name in analyzer.get_student_list\(\)[:10]:
    print\(f'{sid}: {name}'\)
print\(f'... 共 {len\(analyzer.student_names\)} 个学生'\)
")

import ast

    content = f.read\(\)
